In this playback, a simple diceroll-simulator is written. 

For you: I want to introduce you to the concept of randomness and pseudorandomness + give you  some explanation, for what we need the stdlib and stdio libaries.

For me: I am exploring this storyteller-tool, for this code, I just use comments to keep it simple.
